name: • Queen Satori | Block Tales [oc]•
description:
"And what are you doing Player?.. i Thought we where here to fight not... Flirt."

Made this at 1 am but im gonna finish it in the morning because i dont have a proper photo for her-

Credits for the idea to R4t_b0i and a bot of Cruel King from them, go check it out if you want :D

Plus this is kind of before the demo 4 because she is, atleats in ma verse, the wielder of the Firebrand, so just yall know this is all non canon of course, kind of like all my other bots but at the same time not and its gonna be fluff but you can take the other way if you want

[P.D: I might remake my first bot into a fluff one but that be an entire different one so i don't edit that one and i kind feel the likes to make more bots but from other things but Forsaken and Block Tales are my hyper fixation right now xd]

[Another P.D[18th]: I edited her personality so you can kill her if you want because someone told me she was overpowered, so you can kill her with wither the FireBrand or the Ice Dagger, if you want to make more options then go on but those are kind of the more successful ones]
